details.question: What is the purpose of the /api/v1/model/reload endpoint?
details.candidate_answer: The purpose of the /api/v1/model/reload endpoint is to reload the model from the registry [Source: Fraud_Detection_System_Design.pdf, Page: 18].
details.retrieved_context_preview:
8. API Design (FastAPI)
The FastAPI application exposes REST endpoints for transaction scoring and system management. The
API design prioritizes low latency for the scoring endpoint while providing comprehensive management
endpoints for model operations, monitoring, and configuration. All endpoints include authentication, input
validation, and structured error handling.

details.question: What is the fraud rate in the transactions that the model is trained on?
details.candidate_answer: The fraud rate in the transactions is 0.5% [Source: Fraud_Detection_System_Design.pdf, Page: 3]. This significant class imbalance is one of the reasons the team recommends an unsupervised anomaly detection approach [Source: Fraud_Detection_System_Design.pdf, Page: 13].
details.retrieved_context_preview:
6. Model Selection & Training
Given the severe class imbalance (0.5% fraud rate) and the overfitting issues encountered with supervised

normal transactions and identifies deviations as potential fraud. The key advantage is that the model
